metadata.description: Local development fixture for testing the marketplace UI

plugins.name: aws-cost-analyzer
plugins.description: Connects to AWS Cost Explorer and explains your bill in plain English, highlighting anomalies and recommending savings.

plugins.name: ci-pipeline-gen
plugins.description: Generates GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and CircleCI pipelines tailored to your project's language and framework.

plugins.name: dotnet-migrator
plugins.description: Automates .NET Framework to .NET 8 migration: updates project files, NuGet packages, and flags breaking API changes.

plugins.name: figma-to-code
plugins.description: Converts Figma frames into React + Tailwind CSS components, preserving spacing, typography, and color tokens.

plugins.name: github-pr-coach
plugins.description: Reviews pull requests like a senior engineer: checks for missing tests, unclear naming, and leaves actionable inline comments.

plugins.name: go-tester
plugins.description: Writes table-driven Go tests for your functions, covering edge cases and generating benchmarks automatically.

plugins.name: jest-writer
plugins.description: Generates Jest test suites for JavaScript and TypeScript modules, including mock setup and snapshot tests.

plugins.name: k8s-deploy
plugins.description: Generates Kubernetes manifests and Helm charts from your service description. Supports multi-env overlays with Kustomize.

plugins.name: mcp-server-gen
plugins.description: Scaffolds a fully typed MCP server with tools, resources, and prompts. Generates OpenAPI specs and client SDKs.

plugins.name: python-linter
plugins.description: Runs ruff and mypy on your Python code and explains every violation in plain English, suggesting fixes inline.

plugins.name: react-helper
plugins.description: Scaffolds React components, hooks, and context providers. Supports TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Storybook.

plugins.name: rust-refactor
plugins.description: Identifies unsafe Rust patterns and rewrites them using idiomatic ownership and borrowing, with lifetime annotations.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Scans code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, insecure JWT configs, and secrets accidentally committed to git history.

plugins.name: spring-boot-helper
plugins.description: Generates Spring Boot REST controllers, JPA repositories, and service layers from a simple domain description.

plugins.name: sql-optimizer
plugins.description: Analyzes slow SQL queries, suggests indexes, and rewrites N+1 patterns. Supports Postgres, MySQL, and SQLite.
